title: Why Your Skin Is a Sensitive Touch Screen

segments.text: Your skin can sense touch like a touchscreen.
It’s packed with nerve endings for sensing.
These nerves transmit signals to your brain.
Every touch can evoke different sensations.
Your skin is the most versatile organ.
Think of how much information it processes daily.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your skin is like a touch screen! Follow for daily science & tech! 👋
